mapper.insert: INSERT INTO global_locations ( location_id, user_id, folder_id, name, summary, art_style, image_url, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{locationId}, #{userId}, #{folderId}, #{name}, #{summary}, #{artStyle}, #{imageUrl}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE global_locations SET name = #{name}, folder_id = #{folderId}, summary = #{summary}, art_style = #{artStyle}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE location_id = #{locationId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM global_locations WHERE location_id = #{locationId} AND user_id = #{userId}
